issues.description: Action is KO (kill character), but card text states 'Your opponent cannot activate [Blocker]' — this is a restriction/prevention effect, not a KO. Should use a negation/restriction mechanism or custom effect type, not KO.
Target is AllOpponentCharacters, but the effect prevents Blocker activation (a player action), not targeting characters. Target scope is incorrect for the intended effect.

DSL lacks mechanism to represent 'cannot activate [Blocker]' — this is a conditional restriction during battle, not a damage/KO action. Current DSL structure does not support blocking prevention effects.
[Rush] keyword is mentioned in card text but not represented in DSL. While Rush is a static ability (card can attack when played), it should be noted separately or via effect structure.
